case_title: LUIS GERARDO RUIZ VS. DIGITAL ENGRAVING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, LUIS GERARDO AS TO DEFENDANT DIGITAL ENGRAVING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, LUIS GERARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIGITAL ENGRAVING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $9,696.45 PRINCIPAL, $70.95 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,992.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
